**JOBS_IN_PROCESS_G** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (CREW_ID->EMPLOYEE, EMPLOYEE->EMPLOYEE); JOB_CT_FLX_SCHD (SCHEDULE_KEY -> SCHEDULE); JOB_HEADER (JOB->JOB, SUFFIX->SUFFIX); JOB_OPERATIONS (SEQ -> SEQ); WORKCENTERS (WORKCENTER -> MACHINE)

**JOBS_IN_PROC_AUX** -> BIN_MASTER (AUTO_BIN -> BIN); ITEM_MASTER (AUTO_HEAT->HEAT, AUTO_LOT->LOT)
